metodos.codigoOriginal:
Private pIds

pIds = Replicate(Chr(254), 20)

lcQryGTmpD = [Select * From SigTempC Where cIdQuerys = '] + pIds + [']

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
	.poDataTmp = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0) Or (.poDataTmp.pnIdconn > 0)
		With .poDataTmp
			.AddCursor('SigTempC', 'cIdQuerys', 'crSigTempC', '', , lcQryGTmpD)
		EndWith

		.get_cliente.Value      = Space(10)
		.get_cliente_desc.Value = Space(40)
		.get_operacao.... [TRUNCADO]

=fConfigGeral()

Create Cursor dbOperacao (Emps c(3), Dopes c(20), Numes n(6), Datas T Null, Valos n(12,2))
Index On Emps + Dopes + Padl(Numes, 6) Tag EmpDopNum

Create Cursor dbItens (Emps c(3), Dopes c(20), Numes n(6), Cpros c(14), Dpros c(40), Qtds n(10,3))
Index On Emps + Dopes + Padl(Numes,6) Tag EmpDopNum
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Thisform.get_grupo.Value, 'C', This.Value, This, ThisForm.get_cliente_desc)
	=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 0+48, '')
	This.Value = ''
	This.Refresh
	Thisform.get_cliente_desc.Value = ''
	Thisform.get_cliente_desc.Refresh
	Return 0
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Thisform.get_grupo.Value, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.get_cliente, ThisForm.get_cliente_desc)
	=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 0+48, '')
	This.Value = ''
	This.Refresh
	Thisform.get_cliente.Value = ''
	Thisform.get_cliente.Refresh
	Return 0
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pcConta, pcContaDesc, pcOperacao, pdInicial, pdFinal, pcEmpresa, pcEmpresaDesc

pcGrupo		  = ThisForm.get_grupo.Value
pcConta       = ThisForm.get_cliente.Value
pcContaDesc   = ThisForm.get_cliente_desc.Value
pcOperacao    = ThisForm.get_operacao.Value
pdInicial     = ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.Value
pdFinal       = ThisForm.get_dt_final.Value
pcEmpresa     = ThisForm.get_empresa.Value
pcEmpresaDesc = ThisForm.get_empresa_desc.Value

ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdGcr', 'crSigCdGcr', ... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdOpe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Dopes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Dopes',  '', 'Operaçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('NDopes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Dopes
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdEmp', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Cemps', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cemps', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Razas', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.get_empresa.Value      = crListaRemota.Cemps
	ThisForm.get_empresa_desc.Value = crListaRemota.Razas
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	ThisForm.get_empresa.Value  ... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdEmp', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Razas', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Razas', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cemps', '', 'Código')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.get_empresa.Value      = crListaRemota.Cemps
	ThisForm.get_empresa_desc.Value = crListaRemota.Razas
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	ThisForm.get_empresa.Value  ... [TRUNCADO]

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lcQryGTmpD = [Select * From SigTempC Where cIdQuerys = '] + pIds + [']
